overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding a red motorcycle through the futuristic Night City during golden hour. The journey transitions from coastal roads through neon-lit commercial districts and covered highways, ending with the character dismounting and walking along a sunlit waterfront promenade.

events.description: rider pulls motorcycle over to the sidewalk and stops briefly

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle along a coastal road, briefly pulling over to the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: standing on the sidewalk near a building entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the coastal road against the sky
futuristic commercial buildings with reflective glass facades
wet asphalt road reflecting the golden hour sunlight
paved pedestrian walkway with tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride along a sunlit coastal road lined with palm trees. Modern glass buildings rise on the right while the road stretches ahead. The rider briefly pulls over to the sidewalk around the 4-second mark before the scene transitions.

events.description: moves from coastal road into denser urban street with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the opposite direction

large advertising screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates through urban streets transitioning from the coastal area. Commercial buildings with billboards line the right side while palm trees continue on the left. Other vehicles share the road as the rider approaches an overpass with directional signage.

agents.ego_description: speeding through the neon district, weaving between traffic

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a dense commercial corridor illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and digital signage. High-rise buildings tower on both sides, creating a canyon-like effect. The lighting shifts to a mix of golden hour sun and artificial neon glow as traffic density increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete architecture

events.description: entering dark covered highway underpass with dramatic lighting change

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered highway section, navigating yellow striped road markings

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
linear fluorescent lights illuminating the underpass
bold yellow striped crosswalk patterns on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a dark concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts dramatically from bright neon-lit streets to a shadowy corridor illuminated by artificial ceiling lights. Yellow road markings guide the path as the rider travels through the sheltered space.

events.description: exiting the underpass into bright waterfront plaza facing the setting sun
rider stops the motorcycle and dismounts, transitioning to walking

agents.ego_description: driving out of the underpass, stopping the motorcycle, and dismounting to walk through the plaza

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza toward the waterfront

entered.detail: open paved public space overlooking the water with palm trees
purple futuristic chairs and tables arranged for dining
transparent safety barrier along the waterfront edge
small commercial structure with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The rider emerges from the dark underpass into a dazzlingly bright waterfront plaza facing the setting sun. After stopping and dismounting the motorcycle, the character walks through the open paved area where pedestrians stroll among palm trees and outdoor seating with purple chairs. A glass railing separates the plaza from the water view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing by seated pedestrians and overlooking the water

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor table with glowing purple chair

entered.detail: expansive view of the water with distant shoreline visible through haze
futuristic illuminated seating with purple glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated waterfront promenade sheltered by an overhead structure. The path features distinctive purple illuminated outdoor seating where pedestrians relax. Palm trees line the left side while a glass railing provides views of the water and distant cityscape below. The golden hour sun creates a warm hazy atmosphere over the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on a motorcycle that transitions from a bright coastal road into a dense urban core before ending at a sunlit waterfront promenade. It begins with a ride along a palm-lined coast past modern glass buildings, briefly pulling over to the sidewalk before accelerating into urban streets filled with billboards and directional signage. As the rider pushes deeper into the city, the environment shifts into a canyon of towering high-rises where the golden hour sunlight blends with the vibrant glow of neon digital signage. The scene then plunges into the shadows of a dark concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway, guided by artificial ceiling lights and yellow road markings. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into a dazzlingly bright plaza, where the rider dismounts to walk along an elevated promenade featuring purple outdoor seating and glass railings overlooking the water under a warm, hazy sun.
